stem: A program stores four pieces of data about a pupil: their name, age in whole years, average test score (to one decimal place) and whether they have paid for a school trip (yes/no).
model_answer: Name: string (a sequence of characters). Age: integer (a whole number). Average test score: real (a number that may contain a decimal point). Has paid: boolean (can only be true or false).

parts.label: (a)
parts.prompt: Identify the most appropriate data type for each of the four values.
